sub_pixel_system.notes: No sub-pixel system documentation available for Genesis version

special_mechanics.name: Drill Jump
special_mechanics.description: Aero's signature move from the first game. Can be aimed diagonally up or down to reach enemies and platforms. New to this game is the ability to aim the drill jump straight down, allowing direct attack on enemies below.

special_mechanics.name: Drop Drill
special_mechanics.description: New move variant allowing downward drill attack. Reviewers singled this out as the best of the new moves.

tier_notes: Tier 3 - Empirical/qualitative data only. Wikipedia source provides gameplay mechanics but no quantified physics parameters. Reviews mention 'improved play control' and 'better play control' compared to original but no numerical values documented.
